rights_attestation: User states they obtained their ROM collection ethically and may use it for personal local training.

priority_rom_profiles.why: PyGBA currently has a Pokemon Emerald reward wrapper, making this the fastest GBA ROM path to a shaped RL benchmark.
PyBoy/Gymboy-style wrappers and recent Pokemon RL work make early-game navigation and anti-loop benchmarks practical.
Tetris provides a compact long-horizon planning/control benchmark with simple observations and score-based rewards.
Platformers add pixel control, sparse rewards, hazard avoidance, and exploration pressure.
Turn-based strategy ROMs are useful later for planning, memory, and delayed-credit benchmarks once wrappers exist.

integration_requirements: no ROM files tracked by git
wrapper smoke passes with deterministic seed
runtime profile and frame throughput are reported
promotion creates regression benchmark rather than rerunning saturated games forever
